description: Expected playtest verdict for each curated game. The regression runner boots each entry's project dir through runPlaytest and diffs the actual invariant failures against expectedInvariantFailures. Drift in either direction (new failure we didn't expect, OR a failure we expected that stopped firing) exits non-zero — both are regressions worth investigating. Update this file with `npx tsx regression/run_regression.ts --update` after confirming the new state is correct.

entries.label: Marine Drive rainy-night driving game — the reference clean run
entries.notes: First working driving game. No user bug reports. Used as the 'zero-false-positive' sentinel — if this ever fails any invariant, we've added a false-positive check.

entries.label: top-down driving / coin-collect (replay + score-flicker complaints)
entries.notes: User: (1) after main_menu→play_again coins no longer collect, (2) score flickers on game-over screen. Replay + dynamic-coin-spawn edge case doesn't fire today; the cursor invariant catches a related but different issue. Improve later.

entries.label: 2D pong with CPU (ugly Restart UI + no cursor during play)
entries.notes: User: can't click Restart mid-game because (a) button drawn via this.ui.createButton, (b) no show_cursor in gameplay state. The scene-createbutton invariant nails the root cause. Authored playtest crashed unrelated.

entries.label: 3D platformer with jumping + moving platforms
entries.notes: User: moving platforms don't carry player. The rider-carry is now handled by the pinned moving_platform.ts fix (commit 36e4cf4). interactive_no_collider currently fires for a different reason — platform floor or similar missing physics.

entries.label: Idle clicker — ugly scene-drawn shop UI
entries.notes: User: 'ugly UI on left', 'can't click those ugly UI using the virtual cursor'. scene-createbutton invariant directly maps to root cause: clicker_game system drew Buy buttons via this.scene.createButton instead of HTML panel.

entries.label: FPS warehouse shooter — invisible walls + no robots + own-mesh visible
entries.notes: User reported 3 issues. orphan_prefab directly catches 'no robots' (robot_enemy declared + spawner registered but robots never visible). cursor catches a separate flow issue. Own-mesh visibility would fire via fps_hides_own_mesh IF the game declares gameType=shooter in PLAYTEST.ts — this run's PLAYTEST may not, so the check is gated off.

entries.label: 3D Sonic-style roll-a-ball — physics:false spammed on interactive entities
entries.notes: The canonical torture-test run. CLI author set physics:false on 10 interactive entities (ramp, fence_wall, bumper, coin_pickup, ...). 4 invariants catch 4 real bugs. If any of these stop firing, we've broken coverage.

entries.label: Tic-tac-toe — ugly scene-drawn Restart UI in corner
entries.notes: User: 'ugly Restart UI on top left, can't click it with virtual cursor'. Same root cause as clicker/pong.

entries.label: Space asteroid dodger — rocks no collision + score flicker
entries.notes: User: (1) some rocks pass through (asteroid entity had physics:false — expanded vocab catches it), (2) score flickers on game-over (ui.hud_update keeps firing score key post-match_ended).
